title.en: He was a little disappointed, but quickly adjus...

content.en:
Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian used his seventh form of final form to cast the Extreme Dao Space-Time Sword Blade and slashed at a certain place in the space-time fragments, directly tearing apart the space-time fragments, and even spreading to infinitely distant areas, almost shattering this piece of space-time into two pieces.

Chop!

Chop!

Chop!

Ye Tian attacked again and again, except for slashing the space-time ruins into even more pieces, he did not break this space-time line at all, connecting to other space-time lines.

"Failed!"

Ye Tian had already had this kind of premonition, if it was really so easy, the attack of the Duowei Ancient Demon before his death would also be able to touch other time and space lines.

He was a little disappointed, but quickly adjusted his mentality.

"If I fail, I will fail, if I continue to improve my strength, maybe I will be able to succeed one day!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Moreover, he also has many copy bodies, if multiple copy bodies join forces and use some kind of formation to stack the attacks of the copy body, there may be hope to break through the space-time line and go to other space-time lines.

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Venerable for perfecting the seventh form!"

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Venerable for perfecting the seventh form!"

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Dharma Extremities for perfecting the seventh form!" 620

One by one, the ultimate ancient demons appeared, congratulating Ye Tian one after another.

They had already figured it out, since they would never be able to defeat Ye Tian, it was better to unite with Ye Tian, and in the future, there was hope that with the help of Ye Tian's hand, they would increase the chance of leaving this time and space line.

In this way, they have a greater hope of survival.

Ye Tian ignored these Ultimate Ancient Demons and told them to get out, he needed to continue his retreat and research.

Another long time has passed.

Ye Tian's strength didn't improve much, and he couldn't help him break through the space-time line and go to other space-time lines at all.

And after the final form is perfected, there is no way to continue to increase the power.

"Maybe I can study from the moves, the power of the space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane may still be a little worse, if I can develop some moves in combination with the Final Form, maybe I will burst out with moves that far surpass the space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He deduced it and found that this method was feasible, but it was difficult, second only to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable of the Extreme Dao of the Shock Time and Space Level.

But for now, this may be his only way to break the game.

So in the following days, he used all but one of the replica bodies to study such moves, except for one copy body to guard the Terrans.

And the space-time ruins have suffered again, and in his research again and again, the space-time ruins have been attacked countless times, and they have been shattered to the point that they are not in shape.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Stygian Ancient Demon and them.

"Ten Thousand Laws are Extremely Venerable!"

These Ultimate Ancient Demons didn't know why the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerables had suddenly come to them.

"You have treasures on you that greatly accelerate deduction, even if there are side effects, it doesn't matter!" Ye Tian asked.

"This ......"

These Ultimate Ancient Demons hesitated.

Ye Tian continued: "It's useless for you to keep those treasures, if you help me, maybe I have hope to solve the crisis of the final catastrophe, if you don't take it out, and you reach a real desperate situation, then I can only let you hand over all your resources!"

Ye Tian is a threat, but in a special period, he can only do this.

"We have!"

One by one, these Ultimate Ancient Demons took out some treasures that could assist in deduction, but most of them were not of high grade.

Until one of the Ultimate Ancient Demons, he took out a special treasure, the grade of which was very high, second only to the time-space level Extreme Ultimate Treasure, and was the top Extreme Ultimate Treasure.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, this is the space-time evolution wheel, which can deduce the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao, but it needs to consume its own origin to deduce, and the cost is very high, I have only used it a few times, and I can break through to the Ultimate Ancient Demon, just rely on it!"

He was very reluctant to use it, even if he didn't dare to use it, he didn't want to take it out, but Ye Tian really dared to attack them.

Once it was discovered by Ye Tian, he had hidden this thing, and he would definitely die at that time.

Now that he has taken it out, if Ye Tian completes the breakthrough, maybe he can still get rid of it and survive the final catastrophe.

Ye Tian took these treasures and left immediately.

He began to use these treasures to deduce, especially the Space-Time Evolution Wheel, which was more effective for his assistance.

The reason why Ye Tian asked those ultimate ancient demons for these things was because his deduction and creation efficiency was still too slow, and he wanted to create moves that surpassed the ultimate arcane of the time-space level, and it was still not enough to sacrifice the creation of the copy body.

With the help of these treasures, he might be able to create them.

Sure enough, with the assistance of treasures such as the space-time evolution wheel, his progress was fast, dozens or even a hundred times that of the past, and many spiritual lights bloomed, making him see the hope of creating this move.

Gradually, another incomparably long time passed.

......

Somewhere in the ruins of space-time.

Ye Tian suddenly smiled.

"Hahahaha, the creation of endless years has finally allowed me to create it!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

He had just managed to realize the most crucial step, and the move he had been trying to create was completely free of confusion.

I saw that he opened the seventh form, the final form, and his right hand gradually condensed the breath of the ultimate power, combining the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao and the power of the ultimate will of the Extreme Dao, and gradually formed a ray of light.

This light had the power to destroy all matter, and the entire space-time shatter trembled under this move.

"Broken!"

With a flash of light, it tore through the ruins of time and space, spreading into the unknown. []

And suddenly, a strange breath of time and space spread out from this crack.

Ye Tian was ecstatic, he sensed the breath of another space-time line, although he didn't know which space-time line it was, but at the moment he sensed it, he locked the breath of that space-time line, and he could completely break through the space-time line again and connect to that space-time line.

"I have created a move that transcends the ultimate arcane of the space-time and space-level Extreme Dao, and this move is called the Ultimate Mang!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Ultimate Mang, which can be called the Ultimate Killing Move, is far more powerful than the space-time level Extreme Ultimate Arcane.

Whew!!!

One by one, the ultimate ancient demons shuttled over, one by one full of curiosity.

Just now, that aura was too terrifying, as if facing a space-time level ultimate ancient demon.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, have you broken through?"

A group of Ultimate Ancient Demons asked.

"There is no breakthrough, it's just that a killing move that surpasses the ultimate arcane of the space-time level extreme path!" Ye Tian said lightly.
